title: Jeep-Herders
writer: Harvey Parry, Richard Talmadge, Billy Jones
actors: June Carlson, John Daheim, Pat Michaels
plot: A wildcat oil outfit is seeking to take over the ranch belonging to Pop Martin and his son Bob and daughter Helen. Bob sends his ex-army pals a "stay-way" message, which brings them on the double. The WW II vets use their jeeps, f...
